mapper.insert:
SELECT tradePost_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO tradePost (tradePostNo, tradeTitle, tradeContent, cost, status, memberNo, createDate) VALUES (#{tradePostNo}, #{tradeTitle}, #{tradeContent}, #{cost}, #{status}, #{memberNo}, SYSDATE)
INSERT INTO tradeImage (tradeImgNo, tradeImgUrl, tradePostNo) VALUES (tradeImg_seq.NEXTVAL, #{tradeImgUrl}, #{tradePostNo})
mapper.select: SELECT tp.tradePostNo, tp.tradeTitle, tp.cost, tp.status, tp.createDate, (SELECT ti.tradeImgUrl FROM tradeImage ti WHERE ti.tradePostNo = tp.tradePostNo AND ROWNUM = 1) AS thumbnailUrl FROM tradePost tp ORDER BY tp.tradePostNo DESC
SELECT tp.tradePostNo, tp.tradeTitle, tp.tradeContent, tp.cost, tp.status, tp.memberNo, tp.createDate FROM tradePost tp WHERE tp.tradePostNo = #{tradePostNo}
